facebook.content: When challenges come, do you withdraw and pray or move forward in obedience, believing God is with you? Faith is built in the storm or faith is built in the stillness – which has been true for you? Can you share a time when you chose to act in faith despite uncertainty?
facebook.fullPost:
When challenges come, do you withdraw and pray or move forward in obedience, believing God is with you? Faith is built in the storm or faith is built in the stillness – which has been true for you? Can you share a time when you chose to act in faith despite uncertainty?

facebook.pullQuote: Faith is built in the storm or faith is built in the stillness.

instagram.content:
Kingdom Conversation

Faith is not always about feeling the presence of God, 
but about trusting His promise in your absence. 
Can you relate to trusting God's word when you don't feel His presence?

Double tap if this resonates with you.
